textByHashes.05fbdfc78c742c4850a17bc752dae78ef0118809: Good day, how may I help you?
textByHashes.5267bfd03f1f4f25a0d866dda19c9a816b05ae62: I can sell you up to additional bank slots in sets of 40. How many are you interested in buying?
textByHashes.8711590acfec471a9f59192dadfd8029dfad5df7: Buying additional bank slots will cost coins. Be warned, this purchase is not reversible. Are you happy to proceed?
textByHashes.d315478274b173d13cadb74f820bc21cfc11dee9: Your additional bank slots have been added.
textByHashes.2a4ad04a3cd1df8edbce448c564e080e67b0df6a: This is a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. We have branches in many towns.
textByHashes.781a0067d1995aab06ce84a10c586ea4e76e06d0: We will look after your items and money for you. Leave your valuables with us if you want to keep them safe.
